mapper.select: SELECT * FROM news_article ORDER BY published_date DESC

SELECT YEAR(a.published_date) AS year, COALESCE(k.keyword, 'UNKNOWN') AS keyword, COALESCE(ne.period_stage, 'NONE') AS periodStage, COALESCE(SUM(ak.frequency), 0) AS totalCount FROM news_article a LEFT JOIN article_keyword_map ak ON a.article_id = ak.article_id LEFT JOIN keyword_dictionary k ON ak.keyword_id = k.keyword_id LEFT JOIN news_event_map nem ON a.article_id = nem.article_id LEFT JOIN nuclear_event ne ON nem.event_id = ne.event_id GROUP BY YEAR(a.published_date), k.keyword, ne.period_stage ORDER BY year ASC

SELECT k.keyword AS keyword, k.category AS category, SUM(ak.frequency) AS frequency FROM keyword_dictionary k JOIN article_keyword_map ak ON k.keyword_id = ak.keyword_id GROUP BY k.keyword_id, k.keyword, k.category ORDER BY frequency DESC

SELECT YEAR(a.published_date) AS year, COALESCE(k.keyword, 'UNKNOWN') AS keyword, COALESCE(ne.period_stage, 'NONE') AS periodStage, COALESCE(SUM(ak.frequency), 0) AS totalCount FROM news_article a LEFT JOIN article_keyword_map ak ON a.article_id = ak.article_id LEFT JOIN keyword_dictionary k ON ak.keyword_id = k.keyword_id LEFT JOIN news_event_map nem ON a.article_id = nem.article_id LEFT JOIN nuclear_event ne ON nem.event_id = ne.event_id GROUP BY YEAR(a.published_date), k.keyword, ne.period_stage ORDER BY year ASC
